decisions.title: Product fantasy and first-ship scope
decisions.decision: SlackPad 360 is a Windows-first hybrid finger-skate game: two trackpad contacts as feet; Skate-like forgiving initiation + THUG2-like line exploration without IP copy. First ship: one compact plaza, small combinable trick vocab, progression-light sandbox. Not a microscopic rigid-body sim; not pure canned animation; not pure browser dual-foot.

decisions.title: Measurable physics/feel quality bars
decisions.decision: Replace unfalsifiable AAA parity claims with PQ-1..PQ-8 and EX-1..EX-3 bars (continuity, interruptibility, landing fairness, agency survey, failure clarity, grind skill band, combo ownership, determinism tools; plaza line loops/verticality).
alternatives: Market as Skate/THUG2 quality without metrics
unresolvedQuestions: Exact cone degrees and snap meters pending prototypes

decisions.title: Normative ContactFrame v1 and single pipeline
decisions.decision: ContactFrame schemaVersion 1 (research schema) is the sole input contract for hardware, agent, replay, and synthetic sources. Foot roles live in InputProfile after frames. Agent injects frames only.
unresolvedQuestions: SharedBuffer vs JSON when G3 fails

decisions.title: Board-local relative control
decisions.decision: Reject finite pad→world teleport. Rest-pose calibration, segment yaw-rate steering, soft recenter, edge clamp without world snap.

decisions.title: Click attribution and click-centered FSM
decisions.decision: Button 1 is report-level; attribute by planted feet (tail-only ollie, nose-only nollie, both push) plus motion windows. Rule-based temporal FSM primary; ML not primary. Logical foot tracker with deterministic dual-lift reassignment.
alternatives: Hardware per-finger click (impossible on PTP Button 1)

decisions.title: v0 trick vocabulary and grind family
decisions.decision: Ship push, steer, ollie, nollie, kickflip (heelside), heelflip (toeside), front/back shuv 180, catch, land, bail, 50-50 grind family. Defer manuals, powerslides, reverts, expanded grinds post-G2.

decisions.title: Hybrid assisted Rapier controller
decisions.decision: Gesture opens ManeuverSpec impulses/torque targets; Rapier owns integration/collisions; assists interruptible; assist levels 0-2; soft grind snap default Assist 1; single dynamic board body v0; playable skate scale meters.

decisions.title: Default low three-quarter chase camera
decisions.decision: Default low three-quarter chase with look-ahead, air pull-back, grind overhead blend 10-20%, spring-arm occlusion; camera never rewrites board-relative foot mapping. Side/overhead assist optional.

decisions.title: Primary Windows host architecture
decisions.decision: Primary: .NET 8 host + WebView2 + touchpad bridge emitting ContactFrame into TypeScript Three.js/Rapier game. Input order: Win11 RegisterTouchpadCapableWindow + GetPointerFrameTouchpadInfo (himetric) then Raw Input HID PTP fallback. Packaging fallback: Electron + N-API. Probe-only: standalone localhost bridge. Reject pure browser for human dual-foot.
unresolvedQuestions: C# vs Rust if HID safety issues dominate

decisions.title: Professional tactile art direction and CC0-first pipeline
decisions.decision: Detailed coherent daylight plaza + hero board/shoes; restrained effects; PBR; performance via budgets/LOD/meshopt/KTX2 not permanent unlit prototypes. Catalog-first assets; CC0 preferred; assets/runtime only approved shipping files. Cycle 1 does not populate runtime.
alternatives: Ugly prototype aesthetic as ship look
unresolvedQuestions: Whether re-dressed CC0 kits pass professional bar under G5

decisions.title: Compact plaza, minimal HUD, audio policy
decisions.decision: One modular plaza with ≥3 line loops, rails/ledges/stairs/banks/QP, recoverable failures, checkpoint respawn. Minimal HUD; calibration and input theater. Audio: board/surface/impact/grind/ambience; music opt-in licensed/original only.

decisions.title: Gates G1-G6 and deterministic observability
decisions.decision: G1 input, G2 feel, G3 latency, G4 determinism before production content; G5 performance and G6 agent before content lock. Golden ContactFrame traces, synthetic generators, fast-check PBT (dev), playtest E1-E6, hardware matrix. Subjective claims use structured surveys.

decisions.title: Dependency and OSS reuse policy
decisions.decision: Adopt three + rapier3d-deterministic + Vite/TS stack; study RawInput.Touchpad and WebView2Samples; optional three-mesh-bvh for render queries; fast-check and SpectorJS dev-only; pipeline gltf-transform/meshopt/KTX2; reject AbsoluteTouchEx injection and unlicensed assets; study Godot/Unity skate prototypes for feel only; rule FSM over $P+ primary.
unresolvedQuestions: Pin exact package versions at implementation
